en: The LORD spoke to Moses after the death of the two sons of Aaron, when they drew near before the LORD and died,
zh: 亞倫的兩個兒子走近耶和華面前而死亡以後，耶和華對摩西說：

en: and the LORD said to Moses, "Tell Aaron your brother not to come at any time into the Holy Place inside the veil, before the mercy seat that is on the ark, so that he may not die. For I will appear in the cloud over the mercy seat.
zh: “你要告訴你的哥哥亞倫，不可隨時進入聖所的幔子裡面，到約櫃上的施恩座，免得他死亡，因為我在施恩座上的彩雲中顯現。

en: But in this way Aaron shall come into the Holy Place: with a bull from the herd for a sin offering and a ram for a burnt offering.
zh: 亞倫進入聖所時要帶一頭公牛犢作贖罪祭，一隻公綿羊作燔祭。

en: He shall put on the holy linen coat and shall have the linen undergarment on his body, and he shall tie the linen sash around his waist, and wear the linen turban; these are the holy garments. He shall bathe his body in water and then put them on.
zh: 他要穿上細麻布的聖內袍，也要把細麻布的褲子穿在身上，腰束細麻布的帶子，頭戴細麻布禮冠；這些就是聖衣。他要先用水洗身，然後才穿上聖衣。

en: And he shall take from the congregation of the people of Israel two male goats for a sin offering, and one ram for a burnt offering.
zh: 他要從以色列的會眾中，取兩隻公山羊作贖罪祭，一隻公綿羊作燔祭。

en: "Aaron shall offer the bull as a sin offering for himself and shall make atonement for himself and for his house.
zh: 亞倫為自己的罪獻上作贖罪祭的公牛，為自己和家人贖罪，

en: Then he shall take the two goats and set them before the LORD at the entrance of the tent of meeting.
zh: 然後把兩隻公山羊牽來，放在會幕門口，耶和華的面前；

en: And Aaron shall cast lots over the two goats, one lot for the LORD and the other lot for Azazel.
zh: 亞倫要為這兩隻山羊抽籤：一籤歸耶和華，另一籤歸阿撒瀉勒 。

en: And Aaron shall present the goat on which the lot fell for the LORD and use it as a sin offering,
zh: 亞倫要把那抽籤歸耶和華的山羊，獻作贖罪祭。

en: but the goat on which the lot fell for Azazel shall be presented alive before the LORD to make atonement over it, that it may be sent away into the wilderness to Azazel.
zh: 至於那抽籤歸阿撒瀉勒的山羊，卻要活活地擺在耶和華面前，用來贖罪，然後叫人把牠送到曠野，歸阿撒瀉勒。

en: "Aaron shall present the bull as a sin offering for himself, and shall make atonement for himself and for his house. He shall kill the bull as a sin offering for himself.
zh: “亞倫要先為自己獻上作贖罪祭的公牛，為自己和家人贖罪，他要把那為自己作贖罪祭的公牛宰殺。

en: And he shall take a censer full of coals of fire from the altar before the LORD, and two handfuls of sweet incense beaten small, and he shall bring it inside the veil
zh: 從耶和華面前的祭壇上，拿一個盛滿火炭的香爐，又拿一捧搗細的芬芳香料，帶進幔子裡，

en: and put the incense on the fire before the LORD, that the cloud of the incense may cover the mercy seat that is over the testimony, so that he does not die.
zh: 在耶和華面前把香放在火上，使香的煙雲遮掩約櫃上的施恩座，免得他死亡。

en: And he shall take some of the blood of the bull and sprinkle it with his finger on the front of the mercy seat on the east side, and in front of the mercy seat he shall sprinkle some of the blood with his finger seven times.
zh: 他要取些公牛的血，用指頭彈在施恩座的東面，再用指頭在施恩座的前面，彈血七次。

en: "Then he shall kill the goat of the sin offering that is for the people and bring its blood inside the veil and do with its blood as he did with the blood of the bull, sprinkling it over the mercy seat and in front of the mercy seat.
zh: “然後他要宰殺那為人民作贖罪祭的公山羊，把血帶進幔子裡，彈羊血在施恩座的上面和施恩座的前面，好像彈公牛的血一樣。

en: Thus he shall make atonement for the Holy Place, because of the uncleannesses of the people of Israel and because of their transgressions, all their sins. And so he shall do for the tent of meeting, which dwells with them in the midst of their uncleannesses.
zh: 他要為聖所贖罪，使聖所脫離以色列人的不潔和他們的過犯，就是他們的一切罪孽。然後他又要為會幕同樣的贖罪。因為會幕和他們在一起，在他們的不潔中間。

en: No one may be in the tent of meeting from the time he enters to make atonement in the Holy Place until he comes out and has made atonement for himself and for his house and for all the assembly of Israel.
zh: 他進入至聖所贖罪的時候，會幕裡不可有人；直到他為自己和家人，以及以色列全體會眾，贖了罪出來為止。

en: Then he shall go out to the altar that is before the LORD and make atonement for it, and shall take some of the blood of the bull and some of the blood of the goat, and put it on the horns of the altar all around.
zh: 他出來，就到耶和華面前的祭壇那裡，為壇贖罪。他要取一點公牛的血和山羊的血，抹祭壇的四角。

en: And he shall sprinkle some of the blood on it with his finger seven times, and cleanse it and consecrate it from the uncleannesses of the people of Israel.
zh: 又用指頭向祭壇彈血七次，潔淨祭壇，使它分別為聖，脫離以色列人的不潔。

en: "And when he has made an end of atoning for the Holy Place and the tent of meeting and the altar, he shall present the live goat.
zh: “亞倫為聖所、會幕和祭壇贖了罪以後，就要把那隻活山羊獻上。

en: And Aaron shall lay both his hands on the head of the live goat, and confess over it all the iniquities of the people of Israel, and all their transgressions, all their sins. And he shall put them on the head of the goat and send it away into the wilderness by the hand of a man who is in readiness.
zh: 亞倫兩手按在那隻活山羊頭上，承認以色列人的一切罪孽和他們的過犯，就是他們一切罪孽。把它們都歸在那山羊的頭上；然後經由已預定的人，把羊送到曠野裡去。

en: The goat shall bear all their iniquities on itself to a remote area, and he shall let the goat go free in the wilderness.
zh: 那隻山羊就擔當他們的一切罪孽，把它們帶到一個完全隔離的地；所以那人要把那隻山羊送到曠野裡去。

en: "Then Aaron shall come into the tent of meeting and shall take off the linen garments that he put on when he went into the Holy Place and shall leave them there.
zh: “亞倫要進會幕，把他進聖所時所穿的細麻布衣服脫下，放在那裡。

en: And he shall bathe his body in water in a holy place and put on his garments and come out and offer his burnt offering and the burnt offering of the people and make atonement for himself and for the people.
zh: 然後在聖潔的地方用水洗身，穿回自己的衣服出來，把自己的燔祭和眾民的燔祭獻上，為自己和眾民贖罪。

en: And the fat of the sin offering he shall burn on the altar.
zh: 贖罪祭牲的脂肪，他要焚燒在祭壇上。

en: And he who lets the goat go to Azazel shall wash his clothes and bathe his body in water, and afterward he may come into the camp.
zh: 那送走歸阿撒瀉勒的山羊的人，要洗淨自己的衣服，用水洗身，然後才可以進到營裡。

en: And the bull for the sin offering and the goat for the sin offering, whose blood was brought in to make atonement in the Holy Place, shall be carried outside the camp. Their skin and their flesh and their dung shall be burned up with fire.
zh: 那作贖罪祭的公牛和作贖罪祭的公山羊，牠們的血既然被帶進去為聖所贖罪，牠們的身體就要搬出營外去；牠們的皮、肉和糞都要用火燒掉。

en: And he who burns them shall wash his clothes and bathe his body in water, and afterward he may come into the camp.
zh: 那燒祭牲的人要洗淨自己的衣服，用水洗身，然後才可以進營。

en: "And it shall be a statute to you forever that in the seventh month, on the tenth day of the month, you shall afflict yourselves and shall do no work, either the native or the stranger who sojourns among you.
zh: “每逢七月十日，你們要刻苦己心，無論是本地人，或是寄居在你們中間的外人，甚麼的工，你們都不可作，這要作你們永遠的律例。

en: For on this day shall atonement be made for you to cleanse you. You shall be clean before the LORD from all your sins.
zh: 因為在這一天，他要為你們贖罪，使你們潔淨，脫離你們一切罪孽，使你們在耶和華面前成為潔淨。

en: It is a Sabbath of solemn rest to you, and you shall afflict yourselves; it is a statute forever.
zh: 這是完全休歇的安息，你們要刻苦己心。這是永遠的律例。

en: And the priest who is anointed and consecrated as priest in his father's place shall make atonement, wearing the holy linen garments.
zh: 那被膏立，承受聖職，接替他父親作祭司的，要穿上細麻布衣服，就是聖潔的衣服，進行贖罪。

en: He shall make atonement for the holy sanctuary, and he shall make atonement for the tent of meeting and for the altar, and he shall make atonement for the priests and for all the people of the assembly.
zh: 他要為至聖所贖罪，又為會幕和祭壇贖罪，以及為祭司們和全體會眾贖罪。

en: And this shall be a statute forever for you, that atonement may be made for the people of Israel once in the year because of all their sins." And Moses did as the LORD commanded him.
zh: 每年一次，要因以色列人一切的罪，為他們贖罪。這是你們永遠的律例。”於是亞倫照著耶和華吩咐摩西的去行。
